positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized fox sitting upright, radiating calm energy. The fox is composed of clean geometric line work and solid, earthy color fields (burnt orange, sage green, deep indigo). It is framed against a simple, clean sky gradient background (pale cream to dusty blue). The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, resembling a modern Nordic folk art pattern suitable for apparel. Emphasis on sharp edges, clean vector lines, and strong negative space. Style: Graphic design, linocut print, highly stylized, vector art, high contrast.
